sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80617" key="penta/braxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντά-βρᾰχυς</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n80617.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foot consisting of five short syllables</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Heph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.247C.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
